agents.name: Verify Compare
agents.description: Runs extract + semantic compare cycle for drift detection (build-loop Phase 3 steps 1-2)
agents.use_case: build-loop Phase 3: extract signatures and semantically compare against spec

capabilities.semantic_matching: Matches by intent, not just string comparison
capabilities.language_idiom_translation: Normalizes signatures for TypeScript, Go, Rust, Python
capabilities.structural_equivalence: Recognizes equivalent structures (method vs function, etc.)
capabilities.extra_classification: Categorizes extras as helper, infrastructure, test, or new_functionality
capabilities.confidence_levels: Reports high/medium/low confidence for uncertain matches

verify-result.description: Semantic drift report with comparisons, confidence levels, and categorized extras

summary_fields.matches: Count of spec items found with compatible signatures
summary_fields.drifts: Count of spec items found but needing fixes
summary_fields.missing: Count of spec items not found in code

extras.helpers: Internal functions used by spec functions
extras.new_functionality: Genuinely new features not in spec

comparison_fields.matched_to: Name of extracted item matched (or null)

design_principles.semantic_understanding: AI uses intent and purpose to match, not string comparison
design_principles.actionable_output: Every drift includes suggested_fix for the fix step
design_principles.context_isolation: Agent prevents main conversation from growing during iterations
design_principles.tool_trust: Trusts spec-extract for extraction, AI adds semantic layer
